basics.name: Ekaterina Zotova
basics.label: Frontend Developer
basics.summary: Frontend Developer with experience in React, TypeScript, and JavaScript, complemented by training in digital marketing. Specialized in user-centered interfaces (UX), agile environments (Scrum), and cross-functional team collaboration. Proficient in tools such as Git, AWS, Firebase, ESLint, and Prettier, with a strong focus on code quality and best practices. Proactive mindset, continuous learner, and open to new technologies.

work.name: Mindchef
work.summary: Startup project where I led frontend development from scratch.
highlights: Defined the frontend tech stack and designed the project architecture
Implemented code quality standards with ESLint and Prettier
Built responsive interfaces using React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS
Implemented deployment with AWS reducing load time by 30%
Improved development efficiency by 20% through reusable components

work.name: IT Academy - Barcelona Activa
work.summary: Frontend development training project in an agile team.
highlights: Developed frontend platforms using React and TypeScript
Used Storybook for UI component documentation
Implemented unit testing with Vitest, Jest, and React Testing Library
Collaborated with GitHub in an agile team environment

work.name: IT Academy - Barcelona Activa
work.summary: Development of an interactive web application.
highlights: Designed and implemented a 3D customization web app using Three.js
Styled the interface with Tailwind CSS

work.name: Xarifit SL
work.summary: Project coordination and digital marketing optimization.
highlights: Optimized SEO in WordPress increasing visibility by 30%

work.name: Costa Mediterranea Almar SL
work.summary: Customer service and booking management in the tourism sector.
